title: Player Ping Logger
description: Player ping logger for minecraft 1.21.X purpur/paper. Logs players ping on a regular basis to a txt file.
body:
# Minecraft Player Ping Logger
Simple plugin that logs players pings every 1200 ticks (60 seconds) to a txt file.

Supported minecraft versions: Paper/Purpur 1.21.x


### bStats

![Plugin bStats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/Player%20Ping%20Logger.svg)
